_comment: handoff-fanout config (referenced from $HANDOFF_HOME/config.json). Drop unused keys; all fields are optional with safe defaults.
inject_blocks:
## Project red lines (example)
- never edit src/legacy/ without an ADR
- treasury operations must go through journal_service.post_entry()

baseline_hooks._comment: Each hook runs in the workspace dir; the captured output is added to the handoff baseline block. `regex` is optional — when set, the first match group is stored.
baseline_hooks.name: Alembic

roadmap._comment: Optional file whose phase sections are excerpted into the handoff prompt.

_mandate_projects_comment: Optional v5.4 mandate roll-out allowlist (must be a NON-EMPTY list of slugs). The global dump entry re-execs the engine, so the global HANDOFF_RETRO_MANDATE / HANDOFF_AUDIT_MANDATE env would enforce on EVERY project's active dump. List only projects ready for the precheck + --retro-evidence flow; unlisted siblings take the legacy (no-gate) path. FAIL-CLOSED: every degenerate shape — key absent, [], a bare string typo, all-invalid entries — enforces EVERYWHERE (an accidental empty never silently disables the mandate). To genuinely disable, unset the env mandate, not this key. An explicit --retro-evidence or HANDOFF_RETRO_BYPASS always runs the gate regardless.
